summary: Started matching and documenting src/melee/mn/mnvibration by adding substantial C implementations, local data structs, JObj/Text/menu handling, static/global data declarations, and recovered header prototypes. The bot report credits 5 new matched functions and multiple partial improvements in the mnvibration unit, but the author explicitly described the PR as WIP with preliminary comments to be validated in follow-up PRs.

key_files.role: Main implementation work: added includes, local inline JObj translation helpers, static/global data, helper structs, and many mnvibration functions for controller rumble, name-list navigation, JObj animation, text cleanup/creation, and menu object setup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnvibration.c include block and local inline JObj helpers
raw_diff: implementations mnVibration_802474C4, fn_80247510, mnVibration_802480B4, mnVibration_8024829C, mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, fn_80248748, fn_80248A78, mnVibration_80248ED4

key_files.role: Header cleanup: added platform/baselib/mtx includes, introduced MnVibrationFloatData and extern data declarations, and replaced many UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with typed signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: header hunk replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with HSD_JObj*, void, s32 signatures
raw_diff: extern MnVibrationFloatData mnVibration_803EECE0, f32 mnVibration_804DC020, Vec3 mnVibration_803EED04, SDATA assert strings

what_changed.text: Added broad mnvibration implementation coverage, including functions for selecting child JObjs, per-frame input handling, controller rumble toggles, name-list scrolling, JObj animation setup, text allocation/freeing, and menu object creation.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 5 new matches and 12 improved unmatched items

what_changed.text: Recovered local data shapes for vibration assets and runtime menu state, including MnVibrationJointAssets and MnVibrationData with JObj arrays, text handles, title text, cursor gobj, scroll offset, and controller state fields.

Added static/global data declarations for mnvibration, including a u16 index table, rumble backing value, global HSD_GObj pointer, joint asset globals, and header externs for float/vector/string data.
Converted header prototypes for many mnvibration functions from unknown placeholders to typed signatures.
Validation evidence from the PR bot reports +1132 matched-code bytes, 5 new 100% matches, and improvements across other mnvibration functions and data sections.

smart_moves.text: Used a real runtime struct for menu state instead of only raw offsets, making repeated access to jobjs, texts, title_text, cursor_gobj, and scroll_offset reviewable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MnVibrationData definition and uses in fn_80247510, mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644

smart_moves.text: Updated the public header once function bodies established argument and return types, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface.

Kept uncertain global/function names in address-style form where semantics were not proven, while using local role names such as data, cursor_jobj, panel_jobj, scroll_offset, name_count, and rumble_setting inside function bodies.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For early WIP menu decomp, a typed local runtime-state struct can be a useful bridge when many functions repeatedly access the same GObj user_data layout, but field names should remain conservative when semantics are only partially known.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MnVibrationData with mixed semantic and x0/x6 field names
human_pr_text: preliminary documentation via comments, stronger validation deferred

decomp_lessons.lesson: When body work recovers signatures, updating the owning header from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed prototypes is supported and improves downstream callsite review.

Bot match reports are useful evidence for narrow symbol progress, but WIP author notes and partial percentages should prevent treating every comment, field name, or data declaration as fully validated documentation.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: still WIP; preliminary documentation; follow-up validation
text_corpus: bot report with 5 new matches and 12 partial improvements

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names were retained for many globals and functions, including mnVibration_804D6C28, mnVibration_804D4FE8, fn_80247510, fn_80248084, fn_80248748, fn_802487A8, and fn_80248A78.
Struct names use subsystem prefix and role suffixes: MnVibrationAssets, MnVibrationJointAssets, MnVibrationData, MnVibrationFloatData.

Locals mix semantic names where behavior is clear with temporary/register-like names where meaning remains uncertain, e.g. cursor_jobj, panel_jobj, scroll_offset, name_idx, rumble_setting alongside temp_r4, var_r4, var_ctr, sp14, sp10.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Added local inline JObj translation get/set helpers with explicit assert file/line data and a ftCo_800C6AFC update call when JOBJ_MTX_INDEP_SRT is not set.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards prefer existing header inlines/helpers when identifiable; this PR evidence only shows the local-inline tactic, not that it is globally preferred.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used PAD_STACK in several functions, including mnVibration_80248444, fn_80248748, and mnVibration_80248ED4/menu setup area, apparently as a narrow matching tactic.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK requires explicit verifier evidence under current standards; the PR has bot match evidence but no detailed objdiff explanation in the loaded human text.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Preserved MWCC-shaped loops and do-while counters for fixed-size repeated work such as iterating 4 controllers, 8 text slots/name rows, and 0x19 JObjs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: do while i < 4 in mnVibration_8024829C
raw_diff: do while i < 8 in mnVibration_80248644
raw_diff: do while i < 0x19 in mnVibration_80248ED4 excerpt

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Introduced a saved_arg local in mnVibration_80249174 and replaced a casted function-pointer call with a typed direct call to mnVibration_80248ED4(saved_arg).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnVibration_80249174 saved_arg and direct call

review_feedback.text: Author described the PR as still WIP and said the comments/preliminary documentation would be more strongly validated in follow-up PRs.
decomp-dev[bot] reported +0.03% matched code, +1132 bytes, 5 new matches, and 12 improvements in unmatched items for main/melee/mn/mnvibration.
No loaded review comments or human review records were present in the PR slice.

follow_up_queries: mnVibration JObj inline helpers ftCo_800C6AFC pattern

notes: The changed files and major code patterns are well supported by diff and metadata.
The PR body explicitly weakens documentation certainty by calling the work WIP and saying comments would be validated later.
The loaded diff is truncated, so later mnvibration.c details are only partially visible in the slice, though header diff was inspected from the local raw diff.
Bot report supports claimed matching progress for listed functions, but no detailed local objdiff logs or reviewer rationale are loaded.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover headers when mnvibration bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2142 supports updating mnvibration.h from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed prototypes once function bodies recover argument and return types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: corresponding function implementations in mnvibration.c

accepted_candidate_records.title: mnvibration WIP produced 5 bot-reported new matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: Bot report for PR #2142 lists new 100% matches for mnVibration_802480B4, mnVibration_8024829C, fn_80248748, mnVibration_802474C4, and fn_80248084, with additional partial improvements in other mnvibration symbols.

source_update_candidates.title: mnvibration menu path dependencies
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnvibration.c interacts with mnname persistent name data, controller input/rumble APIs, JObj animation, SisLib text objects, and menu transition/audio helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls GetNameCount, GetPersistentNameData, GetNameText, GetRumbleSettingOfPort, HSD_PadRumbleAdd, HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-fact update for curator review; PR evidence shows dependencies but does not by itself establish complete subsystem ownership.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat WIP PR comments as provisional documentation
source_update_candidates.text: When a PR author labels documentation/comments as preliminary and says they will be validated in follow-up PRs, do not promote field comments or semantic names as accepted facts without later evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: preliminary documentation via comments; more strongly validated in follow-up PRs
source_update_candidates.reason: This is already consistent with conservative evidence handling, but curator may want an explicit source-corpus reminder for WIP PR intake.

rejection_notes: Do not promote MnVibrationData field comments such as controller scroll states or connected flags as definitive layout facts from this PR alone; the author marked comments/preliminary documentation as needing follow-up validation.

Do not infer that local mnVibration_JObjGet/SetTranslation helpers are a preferred global cleanup pattern; current standards prefer mapping header asserts back to existing helpers/inlines when supported.
Do not treat PAD_STACK use as accepted style without the narrow verifier evidence required by current standards, despite bot-reported matches.
